aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation but lacks specific optimizations for AI search and conversational queries, which limits AI assistants from citing them effectively.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common customer questions and answers.
Optimize content for long-tail conversational queries related to HVAC services.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues, ensuring reliable local search performance.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or troubleshooting guides.
LocalBusiness schema can be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed maintenance advice.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and expanding service-related FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as a local HVAC authority by publishing expert articles and guides on industry trends and solutions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search and structured data.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistant searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI assistants rarely cite them for service-related queries due to lack of FAQ schema and conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema optimization, conversational content creation, and GBP engagement to boost AI visibility and lead generation.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; acting now prevents losing market share.

email_subject_line: Maximize AI Visibility: Optimize Your HVAC Business for Conversational Search
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI-driven lead generation.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how our AEO strategy can position your business as the top choice for AI-assisted HVAC queries.
page_title: Portland's Top Residential & Commercial HVAC Company
